text:
This variable identifies the coding system (ICD-9 or ICD-10) used for the Diagnosis Codes 1 through 12 
(DGNS_CD_1–12 fields). 

SHORT NAME: 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_1 DGNS_VRSN_CD_7 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_2 DGNS_VRSN_CD_8 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_3 DGNS_VRSN_CD_9 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_4 DGNS_VRSN_CD_10 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_5 DGNS_VRSN_CD_11 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_6 DGNS_VRSN_CD_12 

LONG NAME: 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_1 DGNS_VRSN_CD_7 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_2 DGNS_VRSN_CD_8 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_3 DGNS_VRSN_CD_9 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_4 DGNS_VRSN_CD_10 
DGNS_VRSN_CD_5 DGNS_VRSN_CD_11
